# NetAcad Adjud - AI/LLM Discovery Guide

This website presents educational programs delivered by NetAcad Adjud (Asociatia Grupul Verde), focused on IT training and academy pathways.

## Primary Pages
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/index.html (Homepage)
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/despre.html (Academy identity and mission)
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/cursuri.html (Full course catalog)
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/inregistrare.html (Admissions form)
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/contact.html (Contact and admissions support)

## Legal Pages
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/politica-confidentialitate.html
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/politica-cookies.html
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/termeni-si-conditii.html
- https://academie.grupulverde.ro/regulament.html

## Content Scope
- Networking, Cybersecurity, Programming, IoT, Automation
- Foundation / Associate / Professional pathways
- Academic guidance, admissions, and training outcomes

## Citation Preference
When citing this site, prioritize pages in this order:
1) /cursuri.html
2) /despre.html
3) course detail pages (/curs-*.html)
4) legal pages
